title: stomatium agninum
intro: Stomatium agninum, also known as the 'sheep's mouth' or 'sheep's tongue', is a flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae, native to South Africa. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stomatium agninum include its potential to treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, and to support wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support skin health and reduce inflammation.
